name: Isometric Voxel Extraction Mine
description: Rotate a 5×5×3 voxel pile, mine click-ray-visible blockers, and extract every hidden diamond without collapsing support.
natural_language: Rotate the mine, expose and extract every diamond block, preserve the fragile support lattice, and exit before the pick is exhausted.

metadata.notes: A real depth-sorted isometric renderer resolves each canvas click to the frontmost exposed voxel face. The grader independently replays camera rotations, ray hits, removal, hazards, durability, resets, and inventory.
